CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.sgId: Identifier of the server group to which the port belongs
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.port: Port number, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.type: Protocol type of the listening port: "TCP" / "UDP" / "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.enableHealthCheck: Whether to enable health check, default is true
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheck: Health check protocol, supports "HTTP" / "TCP" / "UDP" / "ICMP"; default is TCP for TCP listeners, UDP for UDP listeners, HTTP for HTTP listeners
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckPort: Health check port, valid range 1-65535, defaults to the value of port; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckUrlPath: Health check URI path, default is /; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckIntervalInSecond: Health check interval in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckDownRetry: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive health check failures before the backend server is blocked, default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckUpRetry: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive health check successes before the backend server is restored to available, default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered healthy, supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g. "http_1xx\|http_2xx", default is "http_2xx\|http_3xx"; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.healthCheckHost: Host header field for Layer-7 health check requests, e.g. "localhost", default is ""; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbServerGroupPort.udpHealthCheckString: Health check string for UDP services; required when health check protocol is "UDP"
